speaker: Derek Sivers
episode_or_content_title: Derek Sivers on Developing Confidence, Finding Happiness, and Saying No to Millions (#125)
verification_notes: Created 2026-05-26 via the Six-State Buildout (Phase 8 human-gated promotion). prototype_only reconstruction — paraphrase of the speaker's documented idea; NOT a verified verbatim excerpt. Derek Sivers is the founder of CD Baby (sold for $22M), author of Anything You Want and Hell Yeah or No. The "Hell Yeah or No" concept originated in his public writing and was discussed on Tim Ferriss Show #125 (December 2015). The official tim.blog URL confirmed via web search. Tier-2 (respected practitioner/author; not academic). The concept is exhaustively documented in his official book (2020) and his website sive.rs. WebFetch of the Sivers distilled transcript (#202, tim.blog/2018/06/20/the-tim-ferriss- show-transcripts-derek-sivers-distilled/) confirmed the concept is discussed but did not yield a clean continuous verbatim block; paraphrase is the honest label.
